name: Talked to insurance already, did I mess up my claim?
description: Maybe; lawyer reviews what you said, proceeds anyway.

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance already, did I mess up my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; lawyer reviews what you said, proceeds anyway.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly if admitted fault; statements used against you.** Recorded calls common[3]. Key factors: No obligation pre-lawyer; get claim number anyway. Utah no pre-suit duty. Stop talking, forward notes to attorney. They mitigate damage.
